Chapter 1609: Innate Eternal Life!

Chapter 1609: Innate Eternal Life!

“What if an Innate Eternal Life was born in Fugu River?”
Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor speculated.
“What? You mean Innate Eternal Life?”
Zhenhe Sword Ancestor said in disbelief.
The other twelve ancestors were also shocked by this guess. Innate Eternal Life is an extremely rare form of life. Once born, it possesses an Eternal body, and if it reaches adulthood, it is enough to match a half-step Eternal Realm expert.
Moreover, the chance for Innate Eternal Life to break through to the Eternal Realm is much greater than that of a half-step Eternal Realm expert.
According to rumors, among the mighty experts in the Eternal Realm, half are Innate Eternal Life.
This shows just how formidable Innate Eternal Life is.
Zhenhe Sword Ancestor quickly asked again, “Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor, Innate Eternal Life is so rare. Why would you make such a guess?”
Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor said, “I’m not guessing randomly. First of all, if Innate Eternal Life truly comes into the world, the commotion will be enormous and attract many powerful experts. The last time Innate Eternal Life appeared, it drew in many half-step Eternal Realm experts, and they even fought over it, causing three half-step Eternal Realm experts to fall. In the end, a mighty Eternal Realm expert appeared and took that Innate Eternal Life away. If the Eternal Tribulation Race discovered that Innate Eternal Life was about to be born, they would occupy Fugu River and then transform it into an Eternal Tribulation Domain. Then they would pay a huge price to seal off the Eternal Tribulation Domain. In that case, outsiders would not be able to get in, and they would also be unable to discover the phenomenon and commotion of Innate Eternal Life being born.”
Zhenhe Sword Ancestor shook his head and said, “That’s only speculation, not evidence.”
Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor smiled and said, “Indeed, it’s not evidence, and it’s not even really related. But before Fugu River was occupied by the Eternal Tribulation Race, a subordinate stationed there sent me a message saying that a strange place had been discovered somewhere in Fugu River, as if some lifeform was gestating there. I didn’t pay much attention at the time, because it was just a small matter, so I ignored it. Looking back now, could it have been Innate Eternal Life in gestation, and my subordinate, lacking knowledge, didn’t know about Innate Eternal Life at all, so he only reported to me that it was a special lifeform?”
“If we add this piece of information, then it really could be Innate Eternal Life.”
Zhenhe Sword Ancestor nodded.
At this moment, another one of the twelve ancestors, Bei Yang Yuan Ancestor, asked, “Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor, do you know the exact location of that special lifeform?”
“I don’t know!” Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor shook his head. “Because I didn’t pay attention, I never asked for the location. If I had known the location, I would have immediately sent Supreme Beings to investigate the information, and I wouldn’t be here speculating.”
“If Innate Eternal Life really exists, then the Eternal Tribulation Race will definitely spare no effort to occupy Fugu River. As for the Supreme Beings under us, there aren’t many of them. Even if we issue a bounty mission, many Supreme Beings are very protective of their lives and may not be willing to risk their lives for that little bit of resources. In the end, the Eternal Tribulation Race will suffer heavy losses, but if they obtain that Innate Eternal Life, all those losses will be made up for.” Zhenhe Sword Ancestor said.
“Then what should we do?” Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor asked.
After thinking for a while, one of the twelve ancestors, Saint Ya Yuan Ancestor, suggested, “Just spread the news that there is a high possibility of Innate Eternal Life in Fugu River, and even publicize the message your subordinate sent you. I believe some people will believe it and even take risks to enter Fugu River. Many forces will probably also send people to investigate whether it is true or false. In that case, the Eternal Tribulation Race can forget about successfully taking Fugu River.”
“This method works. I agree!” Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor immediately agreed.
Thus.
Next, the twelve ancestors spread this news, and it quickly spread throughout the major forces of the Source Sea.
--------------------
Void Source Hall.
Ye Tian also received a message from the Source God Pavilion and was immediately shocked.
“Innate Eternal Life?”
Was this guess reliable?
He was not too sure, but if it were true, then it could explain why the Eternal Tribulation Race was acting this way.
When Ye Tian shared the matter of Innate Eternal Life with the hall spirit of Void Source Hall, the hall spirit revealed some information.
“Master, in fact, the previous master also fell because of Innate Eternal Life!”
the spirit said.
“Wasn’t it said that he was pursued by a great enemy and eventually fell?”
Ye Tian asked in confusion. .........
The spirit explained, “In fact, back then the master and that great enemy were fighting over Innate Eternal Life. If not for the master, that half-step Eternal Realm expert really might have successfully taken away Innate Eternal Life, but the master stopped him in time. In the end, the master was severely injured and gave up the struggle. Later, it was said that a mysterious Eternal Realm expert appeared and, in an instant, took that Innate Eternal Life away. That great enemy lost Innate Eternal Life and blamed all of it on the master, so he came to hunt down the master while he was severely injured and healing. The master knew he wouldn’t survive, so he threw Void Source Hall into a forbidden land and fled, but in the end he was still killed by the other side. However, the master also severely injured the other side at the cost of his life.”
“So that’s how it was!”
Ye Tian understood.
Soon after, he became even more curious and asked, “Why does everyone want to seize Innate Eternal Life?”
The spirit said, “When Innate Eternal Life reaches adulthood, it can grow to the half-step Eternal Realm. If one uses special methods to possess an Innate Eternal Life, then once successful, one can grow into a half-step Eternal Realm expert in the future, and even has a certain chance of breaking through to the Eternal Realm! Of course, the success rate of possessing Innate Eternal Life is too low, so most people who want to seize Innate Eternal Life do not do it for this reason. In fact, the body of Innate Eternal Life contains extremely high innate Eternal rules. If one possesses an Innate Eternal Life, one can continuously comprehend the innate Eternal rules, which is of some help for future breakthroughs in realm and for charging toward the Eternal Realm. Many forces want to seize Innate Eternal Life with the goal of confining it and letting the Supreme Beings comprehend and cultivate from it. Moreover, the innate Eternal crystal core of Innate Eternal Life also has the effect of assisting Ninth-Level Supreme Beings in breaking through to the half-step Eternal Realm.”
Hearing these benefits from the spirit, Ye Tian finally understood why everyone wanted Innate Eternal Life.
At this moment, he felt somewhat excited.
If the Source God Pavilion’s speculation was true, and he found Innate Eternal Life, did that mean he could also replicate Innate Eternal Life?
Thinking of this, he immediately sent his clone to search and investigate for Innate Eternal Life in Fugu River.

Chapter 1610 Found It!

Chapter 1610 Found It!

Fenggu River.
Ye Tian kept activating his copying talent at all times to probe the surrounding situation. Although the innate Eternal Life did not yet fully come into being, so its talent would not be apparent, and he might not necessarily be able to detect it, there would certainly be many Eternal Tribulation Race members stationed near the innate Eternal Life.
Therefore, this method of probing was still useful.
However, Fenggu River was too large, and this way of searching would probably take a very long time.
During this period, Ye Tian was also discovered by the Eternal Tribulation Race. Although he did not have that section of a finger from an Eternal Realm powerful being with him, he still displayed not weak combat power as well as terrifying recovery and survival abilities. Even when surrounded by several Eternal Tribulation Race members of the sixth level, he could easily escape.
And as news of the innate Eternal Life spread, a large number of Supreme Beings poured into Fenggu River, bringing great pressure to the Eternal Tribulation Race in an instant.
A large number of Eternal Tribulation Race members were slain and became the gains of the Supreme Beings.
At the same time, the Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor of the Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain grew anxious.
If things continued to develop like this, Fenggu River was likely to be lost.
If that happened, the price paid by the Eternal Tribulation Race would all go to waste.
Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh!!!
One after another half-step Eternal Realm Eternal Tribulation Race members appeared before Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor, among them the Eternal Tribulation Race’s number one half-step Eternal Realm being—Natural Disaster Tribulation Ancestor.
“Greetings, Natural Disaster Tribulation Ancestor!”
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor said respectfully.
As soon as Natural Disaster Tribulation Ancestor arrived, he asked, “Tianxu, does Fenggu River possess innate Eternal Life? The battle for Fenggu River was entirely a plan initiated by you, and we did not interfere. But this time, the Eternal Tribulation Race has suffered heavy losses, and rumors outside say that innate Eternal Life has been born in Fenggu River, so I had no choice but to come and ask you.”
The other half-step Eternal Realm beings were also waiting for Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor’s answer.
After a moment of silence, Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor replied, “Yes!”
He did not dare to lie; otherwise, Natural Disaster Tribulation Ancestor would certainly be able to find out. After all, Natural Disaster Tribulation Ancestor had greater authority than he did. With a single order, the situation in Fenggu River would certainly be placed before him.
Therefore, he could only answer truthfully.
“The matter of innate Eternal Life is very important, but you should have discussed it with me!” Natural Disaster Tribulation Ancestor said coldly.
“Yes!”
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor lowered his head, not daring to retort.
“Forget it, you did not do anything wrong in this matter. Anyone else would have done the same. Right now, we must completely capture Fenggu River, and absolutely cannot allow the innate Eternal Life to be exposed. At present, the outside world only suspects it, but has no definite evidence.” Natural Disaster Tribulation Ancestor said.
Afterward, Natural Disaster Tribulation Ancestor issued orders, dispatching more Eternal Tribulation Race members into Fenggu River and granting down all kinds of powerful treasures, deciding to protect the innate Eternal Life at all costs.
As a large number of Eternal Tribulation Race members reinforced Fenggu River, an even greater war began.
The entire Fenggu River turned into a huge battlefield, which made it harder for Su He to search for the innate Eternal Life.
At this time, even if he transformed into the body of an Eternal Tribulation Race member, he still had no way to find the innate Eternal Life.
Because the Eternal Tribulation Race members who knew about the innate Eternal Life were certainly very few; perhaps only a small number of Eternal Tribulation Race members throughout Fenggu River knew.
“Search slowly and depend on luck!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
Time passed, and the slaughter in Fenggu River grew increasingly fierce. Ye Tian’s gains were not small either, and another Wind Source Gold Crystal mine vein appeared. Ye Tian also once again snatched a bit of Wind Source Gold Crystal.
In the blink of an eye, a Dark Age of time had passed.
Finally, on this day, Ye Tian’s copied body detected some Eternal Tribulation Ancestors.
These Eternal Tribulation Race members were located at the bottom of Fenggu River and were extremely concentrated.
Even when he came here, these Eternal Tribulation Race members did not attack him.
Moreover, these Eternal Tribulation Race members were hidden very secretly. If he did not use his copying talent to probe, he would have had no idea that there were still Eternal Tribulation Race members here.
“Could this be it?”
Ye Tian speculated.
He prepared to go down and take a look; even if this copied body were to fall, it would not matter much.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian moved to the bottom of Fenggu River and sensed a large formation.
This formation covered a region at the bottom of Fenggu River, which was why no one could discern what was going on here.
Ye Tian did not say another word and immediately attacked the formation.
Rumble rumble rumble!!!!!
With just a single strike, the formation shattered.
After all, such a concealment formation could not possibly have much defensive power; if its defense were too strong, it would be easily discovered.
When the formation shattered, two furious gazes from Eternal Tribulation Race members shot over.
The next moment, they attacked Ye Tian.
As soon as the fight began, Ye Tian was completely suppressed.
These two Eternal Tribulation Race members were very strong, no weaker than the top Void Son, and their distance from the Void Lord who had passed through the third level of the Void Tower was definitely not far. They were absolutely the most top-tier geniuses of the Eternal Tribulation Race in this era.
During the exchange, Ye Tian spied on the situation here.
He sensed a vast life aura, incomparably dense, and it emanated an exalted and supreme Eternal aura.
“It really is innate Eternal Life. Although it has not yet been fully nurtured, the day it is born is not far off!”
Ye Tian said in surprise.
At this moment.
Those two Eternal Tribulation Race members were also tense, while the other Eternal Tribulation Race members were not strong enough to be of help.
They could indeed defeat Ye Tian, but Ye Tian’s survival ability was too terrifying.
“He is hard to kill. Don’t kill him, seal him instead!”
The two Eternal Tribulation Race members decided.
443 Ye Tian was very clear that he probably would not be able to escape, after all, these two Eternal Tribulation Race members were truly very strong, so he did not make much resistance. Soon, the two Eternal Tribulation Race members sealed him up.
Of course, Ye Tian could at any time annihilate this copied body himself.
But he did not do so.
“The innate Eternal Life has not yet fully come into being. Even if I let the copied body bring that section of the Eternal Realm powerful being’s finger and destroy these two, I still would not be able to completely take over this place. By then, the Eternal Tribulation Race would certainly dispatch a large number of their clansmen to encircle and attack me. It would be better to wait until the final moment and then send the copied body over!”
Ye Tian thought to himself like this.
The Eternal Tribulation Race sealed Ye Tian, thinking the problem was solved, and immediately began to reestablish the formation to conceal this place.
Time passed slowly like this—
The Eternal Tribulation Race was also very anxious, because the day the innate Eternal Life would be born was drawing closer and closer. If they still could not completely occupy Fenggu River, then when the innate Eternal Life was born, it would draw the attention of a large number of Supreme Beings.
By then, the Eternal Tribulation Race would likely have to pay a very heavy price to have any hope of taking away the innate Eternal Life, and they might not even succeed.
On this day.
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor and Natural Disaster Tribulation Ancestor held a meeting.
They had a new plan!.

Chapter 1611: Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor Who Severed His Own Cultivation!

Chapter 1611: Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor Who Severed His Own Cultivation!

At the meeting.
The Calamity Tribulation Ancestor ordered, “Tianxu, according to the current progress, it’s probably impossible to completely transform Wind Ancient River into an Eternal Tribulation Domain, so I order you to immediately enter Wind Ancient River and take away the Innate Eternal Lifeform when it is about to be born. In that case, no one will be able to stop you. Once you bring the Innate Eternal Lifeform here, even an Eternal Realm expert will find it very difficult to snatch the Innate Eternal Lifeform from us.”
“Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, I am at Half-Step Eternal Realm and can’t enter Wind Ancient River!”
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor said in a deep voice.
“No, you can enter. You know that!” Calamity Tribulation Ancestor said.
Suddenly.
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor realized what Calamity Tribulation Ancestor meant by those words.
“Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, you want me to sever my cultivation?”
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor was furious.
“That’s right!” Calamity Tribulation Ancestor said. “Your cultivation is already very difficult to advance any further. Severing your cultivation is not necessarily a bad thing, and after severing it, you can still continue cultivating. It won’t take long before you can ascend back to Half-Step Eternal Realm.”
“But if I sever my cultivation, my own potential and foundation will also be severed, and I will never be able to advance any further in the future!” Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor said angrily.
“This is for the sake of the clan!”
Calamity Tribulation Ancestor said.
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor was unwilling to accept it. Although his hope of further progress was very slim, he was at least the third Tribulation Ancestor of the Eternal Tribulation Race!
But he did not dare oppose Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, because Calamity Tribulation Ancestor was truly powerful. If not for Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, the Eternal Tribulation Race would have been destroyed long ago.
“Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, I will sever my cultivation and enter Wind Ancient River!”
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor reluctantly agreed.
That’s right, everything was for the sake of the clan.
An Innate Eternal Lifeform, if used properly, would be enough to bring enormous benefits to the Eternal Tribulation Race, and could even allow the Eternal Tribulation Race to completely soar and rise, no longer having to cower within the Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain.
In the future, the Eternal Tribulation Race would even dare to appear openly in the Source Sea.
Time passed——
On this day, Ye Tian clearly sensed changes in the outside world.
Although he was sealed, he could still initially sense the situation outside.
At this moment, the phenomenon of the Innate Eternal Lifeform’s birth had already begun to appear.
“It’s time to prepare!”
Ye Tian immediately Annihilated this clone body of his.
He did not want to waste any more time. If he missed the opportunity and let the Eternal Tribulation Race instantly take away the Innate Eternal Lifeform, then he would have no time to encounter the Innate Eternal Lifeform.
After all, he was sealed now and could not copy the Innate Eternal Lifeform, so he could only come in again.
Void Source Hall.
Ye Tian accelerated time and soon condensed a clone body, then had the clone body carry that severed finger of an Eternal Realm mighty figure. After all, once he got close to the Innate Eternal Lifeform, he would probably have to fight the Eternal Tribulation Race.
No one knew what force the Eternal Tribulation Race would dispatch at the final moment, so he had to go there in his strongest state.
Very quickly, Ye Tian arrived at Wind Ancient River, entered it, and then traversed at top speed to the vicinity of the place where the Innate Eternal Lifeform was about to be born.
At this moment, the phenomenon here had already begun to expand. It probably wouldn’t be long before the entire Wind Ancient River was covered by it.
Boom!!!!!
A phantom of a one-horned creature, unimaginably vast, crouched and roared in the void, its voice rippling and shaking the sky.
This was the phantom of the phenomenon.
Very soon.
Several nearby Supremes sensed it and immediately reported it.
Thus, countless Supremes learned that an Innate Eternal Lifeform had been born here and rushed over.
At the same time, the Eternal Tribulation Race’s densely packed armies also entered this place.
Since it could no longer be hidden, there was no need to hide it anymore.
Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain.
Under the order of Calamity Tribulation Ancestor, Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor began severing his cultivation.
In the void, blades formed from eternal laws cut into his body from the nothingness.
Waves of screams came from Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor’s mouth, and his aura kept dropping.
Ninefold Realm!
Eightfold Realm!
Sevenfold Realm!
It kept dropping until the peak of the Sixfold Realm, and only then did Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor stop.
Only the peak of the Sixfold Realm could enter Wind Ancient River, so reducing his cultivation to this level was enough.
At this time, Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor quickly recovered from the injuries caused by severing his cultivation by consuming a precious healing treasure.
“Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor, although your cultivation has dropped to the peak of the Sixfold Realm, you have after all mastered an Eternal Technique, and your grasp of eternal laws far exceeds that of other Sixfold Realm experts. Moreover, your Eternal Body has reached the Perfected level, and your body is incomparably strong. You are enough to display strength comparable to the peak of the Eightfold Realm. With the aid of the clan’s treasures, you can even raise your strength to the Ninefold Realm. In Wind Ancient River, you will be an Invincible existence. I hope you won’t let the Eternal Tribulation Race down.” Calamity Tribulation Ancestor said.
“Don’t worry, I will definitely bring the Innate Eternal Lifeform back!”
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor guaranteed, though he was in a very bad mood. He casually dealt with the reply, then prepared to head to Wind Ancient River, not wanting to talk much more with Calamity Tribulation Ancestor here.
Very soon, Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor descended upon Wind Ancient River.
-----------------------
The place where the Innate Eternal Lifeform was born.
Countless Supremes poured into this place and saw the phenomenon, their hearts filled with excitement.
This was an Innate Eternal Lifeform; its value was beyond imagination.
Moreover, outside, one Half-Step Eternal Realm expert after another had already offered sky-high prices. If they obtained the Innate Eternal Lifeform, even if they could not keep it themselves, handing it over to a Half-Step Eternal Realm expert would still earn them enough resources to cultivate to the Ninefold Realm.
“Kill the Eternal Tribulation Race!”
The army of Supremes and the army of the Eternal Tribulation Race began slaughtering each other.
Suddenly.
A gray palm emerged from the void and, with one strike, smashed countless Supremes into pieces.
The power of this strike was terrifying beyond compare!
“No!!!”
One Supreme after another was filled with terror, their bodies crushed into pieces under a terrifying force.
At this moment, Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor appeared.
Some Supremes recognized Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor and immediately revealed expressions of disbelief.
“It’s the Eternal Tribulation Race’s third ancestor—Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor. How can he appear here? Only Eternal Tribulation Race members at the Sixfold Realm are allowed in here, and he is at Half-Step Eternal Realm!”
“No, he severed his cultivation. He is now at the Sixfold Realm!”
“Run! Even Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor at the Sixfold Realm is far from something we can deal with!”
A large number of Supremes fled, but Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor did not pursue them, because protecting the Innate Eternal Lifeform was the most important thing!
At this very moment, the Innate Eternal Lifeform was formally born.
And Ye Tian also approached here at the first possible moment, while activating his Copying talent.

Chapter 1612: The Eternal Realm Has Made Its Move!

Chapter 1612: The Eternal Realm Has Made Its Move!

The copying talent instantly enveloped the place where that innate eternal lifeform was located, detected the other party’s talent, and the copying talent memorized the other party’s body.
In the future, Ye Tian could completely copy the body of this innate eternal lifeform.
In addition.
The talent of this innate eternal lifeform was indeed extremely formidable; its entire body was made of eternal ancestral talents, showing just how powerful its talent was. No wonder it was an innate eternal lifeform.
Power Eternal Ancestral Talent!
Speed Eternal Ancestral Talent!
Defense Eternal Ancestral Talent!
……
Ye Tian already possessed these eternal ancestral talents, so he did not pay them much mind. But there was one eternal ancestral talent Ye Tian did not have, and that was the Undying Eternal Ancestral Talent.
This meant that this innate eternal lifeform possessed undying ability; once it grew up, it would be very hard to kill.
Of course, it had only just been born now. Although it was comparable to an Invincible, its strength was very weak and it could still be easily killed.
Suddenly.
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor locked onto Ye Tian.
“You still dare to come closer? Seeking death!”
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor made his move.
He held a long spear and thrust it at Ye Tian, but he did not go all out.
In his view, Ye Tian was only a Third-Tier Invincible, not worthy of him using his full strength.
Therefore, the power of this strike was only at the Seventh-Tier.
However, this strike was blocked by Ye Tian with a single finger, not harming Ye Tian in the slightest.
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor’s expression changed. Without another word, he immediately attacked with full power; he did not want Ye Tian to ruin this operation.
Boom!!!
Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor attacked with all his strength, endless spacetime shattered, and that terrifying strike seemed as if it was about to Annihilation this boundless expanse.
To Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor, distance was no longer anything. Unless Ye Tian escaped beyond the range of his perception, he could not avoid this strike.
This was an attack power of the Ninth-Tier.
Ye Tian also did not hold back, directly activating the power of that Eternal Realm expert’s finger and unleashing the battle strength of a Ninth-Tier Invincible.
In an instant, a huge finger appeared in the void, as if it stood above all rules, descending directly before Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor and pressing down with a single finger.
With a loud boom!!!!
Ye Tian’s attack collided with Tianxu Tribulation Ancestor’s, causing a spacetime tide; even Fenggu River began to shake violently, and countless regions collapsed.
Crack, crack, crack!!!!

Chapter 1619: This Is Not Black Mist, It Is Black Mist Insects!

Devouring: Eternal Ancestor Talent

Looking for resources?

Copy!
Copy!
Copy!
Copy!

However.

In this way, even after the source tide passed, he could let the Black Mist Insect clone remain in the Primordial Sea.
Outside.

Chapter 1620: The Immortal Ancestor Talent!

Chapter 1620: The Immortal Ancestor Talent!

“It’s done!”

Suddenly.

The only gain was that he had copied a large number of Eternal Ancestor Talents.
Now, he faced two choices.

The second choice was to wait until after leaving before fusing these Eternal Ancestor Talents, and use the time to search for resource treasures himself.
After thinking for a while, Ye Tian decided to choose the first.
He planned to fuse them right here, use the fastest speed to fuse out the talents above the Eternal Ancestor Talents, and then bestow them upon the black mist worm clone, letting the black mist worm clone rise completely and become the king of the black mist worms.
In that case, the black mist worm clone would be able to hold a hegemonic position in the Primordial Sea and naturally collect more good things. At worst, the next time he came in, he would be able to gain countless resources.
Moreover, he was also very curious: what exactly was the talent above the Eternal Ancestor Talents?
“Begin fusing!”
Ye Tian set up a time acceleration great array around him and first began by devouring the Eternal Ancestor Talents.
One by one, the devouring Eternal Ancestor Talents fused together, but the fusion speed was rather slow, and even somewhat laborious. After all, the level of the copied talent was not much higher than the Eternal Ancestor Talents, so fusing the Eternal Ancestor Talents was naturally very strenuous.
But in the end, the devouring Eternal Ancestor Talents still fused together one by one.
During this time.
Some Supreme Beings passed by here, but Ye Tian concealed his figure. As soon as these Supreme Beings sensed the black mist on the island, they were so frightened that they fled immediately, not daring to investigate carefully at all.
Thus, Ye Tian had not been discovered to this day.
Time slowly passed—
Ye Tian did not know how much time had passed, but he had stayed within the time acceleration great array for a very long period, and he had also fused many Eternal Ancestor Talents.
Gradually, after the devouring Eternal Ancestor Talent fused, its power became stronger and stronger, as if a qualitative change could occur at any moment.
Finally, on this day, the devouring Eternal Ancestor Talent transformed completely.
【Devouring: Immortal Ancestor Talent】
This was a talent level above the Eternal Ancestor Talents, and it was also the first Immortal Ancestor Talent Ye Tian possessed.
The Immortal Ancestor Talent was almost completely on the same level as the copy talent, and Ye Tian also clearly sensed that the Immortal Ancestor Talent could no longer continue to upgrade. At the very least, the current copy talent was unable to fuse the Immortal Ancestor Talent any further.
Immediately.
Ye Tian stripped the Immortal Ancestor Talent and bestowed it upon the black mist worm clone, and thus the black mist worm clone also possessed the Immortal Ancestor Talent.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian fused the other Eternal Ancestor Talents one by one.

Chapter 1625 You, I'm afraid, cannot leave!

Chapter 1625 You all, I'm afraid, cannot leave!

Outside the Dark Forbidden Domain.
One after another ninefold Supreme Beings appeared here. Suddenly, a human Third-Tier Invincible stepped out of the Dark Forbidden Domain and was immediately seized by one of the ninefold Supreme Beings.

“Father, several Supreme Beings have appeared outside the Dark Forbidden Domain.”
Ye Xingchen came to pay his respects to Ye Tian.
“Xingchen, I know. Go down. You all cannot get involved in this matter.” Ye Tian murmured.
In fact, he had already learned of it immediately, and had even guessed the reason.
These Supreme Beings were probably here for the Primordial Tree. The Primordial Tree’s value was too high; even a single Primordial Leaf was enough to drive many Supreme Beings mad!
These Supreme Beings coming to snatch his Primordial Tree was very normal. Even without proof, it was still worth the risk.
Ye Tian could have ignored them, but if he did not go, they might become even more aggressive. Moreover, once the Dark Forbidden Domain was no longer sheltered by the Source Sea, the Supreme Beings outside would come in. If a great battle broke out then, it would instead sweep into the Dark Forbidden Domain.
Therefore, he planned to deal with this matter directly and let the outside forces know that Ye Tian was not someone to be trifled with either.
Whoosh!
Ye Tian took one step and crossed out of the Dark Forbidden Domain, arriving at the Source Sea outside, where he also saw five ninefold Supreme Beings.
These ninefold Supreme Beings were all at the peak of the ninefold Supreme Being realm, only one step away from the Half-Step Eternal realm. But without some heaven-defying opportunity, they would find it hard to break through to the Half-Step Eternal realm in their entire lives.
It was precisely because of this that they longed so much for the opportunity represented by the Primordial Tree.
“Five ninefold Supreme Beings!”
Ye Tian let out a breath of relief.

In truth, many of the Source God Pavilion’s experts belonged to other factions, and in a sense, overlapped with some other forces.
But Ye Tian was certain that these five ninefold Supreme Beings were definitely from the same force as the inner-circle members of the Source God Pavilion; otherwise, they would not have been able to receive the news so quickly.
“What do you mean by this? Why have you seized one of my human race’s Invincible ones?”
Ye Tian asked.
One of the ninefold Supreme Beings said in a deep voice, “Endless Ancestor, we hear that you possess a Primordial Tree. Hand it over.”
“Primordial Tree?” Ye Tian sneered. “Who told you that I have a Primordial Tree?”
“Who said it is not important. The point is, if you do not hand it over, not only will this human Invincible perish, but after your Dark Forbidden Domain passes its protection period, we will destroy this Eternal Heaven and Earth.” The other side threatened.
“Are you threatening me?”
Ye Tian said coldly.
He was very clear that even if he denied it, the other side would not believe him; even if he swore an oath, they would not believe him either.
After all, he possessed the ability to manifest clones, and this information was already no secret. By then, even if he made an oath, it would only affect this body; the main body would not be affected.
Therefore, they would not believe his oath.
All five of them wore robes and masks that concealed their auras, but their identities could not hide from Ye Tian at all.

“The five from Golden Orchid Mountain, are you really going to make enemies of me?”
Ye Tian asked.
“Our identities were exposed?”
The five ninefold Supreme Beings were very surprised.

But now, Ye Tian had recognized them with just one glance, which shocked them somewhat.
“You lot, aren’t you afraid I’ll take revenge on Golden Orchid Mountain, on your Eternal Heaven and Earth?” Ye Tian said.
“Not afraid!”
One of them smiled and said, “If we obtain your Primordial Tree, at worst we’ll abandon Golden Orchid Mountain. As for the Eternal Heaven and Earth behind us, destroy it if you want. Anyway, we’ll take our close people with us; what do the life and death of everyone else have to do with us? But you should care a great deal about the human race and the Dark Forbidden Domain, right?”
Ye Tian was silent for several dozen seconds before saying, “How about this: I will fight you all. If you win, I will hand over the Primordial Tree. If you lose, you are not to make any further plans for the Primordial Tree. How about it?”
“No problem!”
The five ninefold Supreme Beings immediately agreed.

After that, the battle began.
Boom!!!!!
Aside from not using the finger of the Eternal realm, Ye Tian displayed battle power between the ninefold Supreme Being realm and the Half-Step Eternal realm.

If Ye Tian did not hide his strength, he was afraid he would scare them.
At the same time, he had another plan.
The moment they exchanged blows, the five Supreme Beings’ expressions changed drastically, and they were completely suppressed by Ye Tian.
Several hours later, the five Supreme Beings had already begun to suffer minor injuries.
“Retreat first. Once we gather more strength, we can come threaten the Endless Ancestor again!” one ninefold Supreme Being proposed.
“Agreed!”
“Agreed!”
The other ninefold Supreme Beings agreed.
Thus, they said in unison, “We admit defeat!”
“Release that Third-Tier Invincible. He is of no value to you. You wouldn’t go so far as to become mortal enemies with me over one human Invincible, would you?”
Ye Tian said.

“You lot, I’m afraid, cannot leave!”

The time-space territories surrounding the Source Sea, however, are varied, unlike the Source Sea, which remains eternally unchanged. Those time-space territories may even give birth to all kinds of precious treasure resources, which are beneficial to Eternal Realm cultivation and development. If some time-space territory develops for a long enough time, the number of top experts it gives birth to may even exceed that of the Source Sea. For example, in the Source Sea, Limit existences are relatively rare, but some time-space territories have many Limit existences.”

Therefore, we Half-Step Eternal Realm experts have no way to leave the Source Sea and go to those time-space territories, unless we are Nine-Extreme Half-Step Eternal Realm experts, who can forcibly tear apart the Source Sea membrane to descend upon those time-space territories.”

“I know that in order to become an Eternal Realm expert, one must fuse with the Eternal Rules. Then why is it that Limit experts have such a hard time breaking through to the Eternal Realm? Logically speaking, shouldn’t it be easier?”

Many Supreme Being experts knew that the stronger a Half-Step Eternal Realm expert was, it did not necessarily mean the greater their hope of breaking through to the Eternal Realm. Many experts who broke through to the Eternal Realm had never even stepped into the Limit.
Thus, he was quite puzzled by this question and still had not figured it out.
At this moment, True River Sword Ancestor and the others sighed.
Wind Ancient Source Ancestor said, “Because of the innate Eternal Rules. Endless Founding Ancestor, you have also comprehended the innate Eternal Rules, haven’t you? We could sense it.”
“Yes. Isn’t comprehending the innate Eternal Rules a good thing? It means one’s control over the rules is deeper!” Ye Tian said.
“No!” True River Sword Ancestor shook his head and explained, “If you only comprehend the Eternal Rules, and have not understood the innate Eternal Rules, then you only need to fuse with the Eternal Rules to advance to the Eternal Realm. But once you accidentally comprehend the innate Eternal Rules, then you can no longer fuse with ordinary Eternal Rules. You must fuse with the innate Eternal Rules before you can advance to the Eternal Realm. This is the real reason why Limit experts have such a hard time breaking through to the Eternal Realm.”
“What? One must fuse with the innate Eternal Rules to advance to the Eternal Realm?”
Ye Tian was learning of such a secret for the first time.
“Endless Founding Ancestor, this secret must not be spread. It is a rule set by the Eternal Realm experts!” True River Sword Ancestor reminded him, fearing that Ye Tian would leak it.
“Why hide this secret?” Ye Tian was puzzled.
True River Sword Ancestor guessed, “There may be two reasons. The first is that they do not want more Eternal Realm experts to be born. Many geniuses originally had a great chance of advancing to the Eternal Realm, but because they did not know this secret and instead comprehended the innate Eternal Rules, the difficulty of breaking through became many times greater. But it may also not be this reason, because although Eternal Realm experts restrict us from spreading it, they have not completely forbidden it, and they did not make us swear an oath. Thus, there is also the possibility of the second reason.”
“The second reason is that Eternal Realm experts also hope to give birth to more Eternal Realm experts who advanced by way of the Limit. Such Eternal Realm experts have greater potential, a higher future, and can step into even higher levels.”
“Endless Founding Ancestor, you have already comprehended the innate Eternal Rules, so you must also advance to the Limit before fusing with the innate Eternal Rules, and only then can you advance to the Eternal Realm.”
Ye Tian suddenly understood. In his heart, he was not panicking at all; he was very confident in himself and believed that he could certainly fuse with the innate Eternal Rules and thus advance to the Eternal Realm.
Next, Ye Tian chatted continuously with the other Twelve Ancestors, learning more and more secrets.
Suddenly.
True River Sword Ancestor suggested, “In some time, the Wuhen Territory will open, and we are preparing to go there again this time.”.

Chapter 1636 The Three Great Opportunities of the Homeless Domain!

Chapter 1636 The Three Great Opportunities of the Homeless Domain!

Of course, the Homeless Domain is also extremely dangerous. Within it exists a very terrifying creature—the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Python, perhaps once a pet raised and studied by the Homeless Ruler.
But now that the Homeless Ruler has fallen, the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Python is no longer under control, yet it still persists in fulfilling its mission of guarding the Homeless Domain. Once anyone enters the Homeless Domain, they will be attacked by the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Python.
And the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Python is incredibly powerful, basically all of them are half-step Eternal Realm, and the strongest among them can even rival half-step Eternal Realm experts at the Extreme level.
Therefore, Supreme Beings are simply not suited to enter the Homeless Domain; entering means death.
According to information revealed by the other twelve ancestors, the Homeless Domain has three great opportunities.
The first opportunity is the Boundless Sea. The Boundless Sea within the Homeless Domain gives birth to many rare resources, but there is also the main base of the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Python. Without absolutely formidable strength, entering there is courting death.
The second opportunity is Rift Wind Valley. This valley can be said to be a place for cultivation, or it can also be said to be a marvel.
Rift Wind Valley constantly blows a strange wind, and this strange wind can affect the will of half-step Eternal Realm experts.
The soul and body of a half-step Eternal Realm expert have fused, but that does not mean they have no will. Will still exists, and it has a great influence.
If one’s will is strong, one can hold fast to one’s original heart, which is of great benefit to breakthroughs, and can even provide some help in breaking through bottlenecks.
Moreover, the will of half-step Eternal Realm experts is already very strong, so tempering it is extremely difficult, yet Rift Wind Valley can help temper the will.
Furthermore, there are no Temporal-Spatial Dragon Pythons in Rift Wind Valley; the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Pythons do not like to go there.
Therefore, Rift Wind Valley is the safest and easiest opportunity to enter, but raising one’s will requires a very long period of time.
More importantly, even half-step Eternal Realm experts find it difficult to stay in Rift Wind Valley for long. Once too much time passes, Rift Wind Valley will cause the will to shatter, and the body will collapse as a result.
Moreover, Rift Wind Valley can only be entered at specific times; at other times, it simply cannot be entered, and no half-step Eternal Realm expert would remain in the Homeless Domain all the time, as that would be far too dangerous.
So those half-step Eternal Realm experts would only stay in Rift Wind Valley for a period of time before leaving.
Ye Tian quietly remembered this place, Rift Wind Valley.
The third opportunity is Homeless Mountain. This was once the residence of the Homeless Ruler. Although it was left in a shattered state after a great battle, many good things still remained, which is why Homeless Mountain is also the greatest opportunity in the Homeless Domain and the place that many half-step Eternal Realm experts all want to enter.
The day the Homeless Domain opens will be three kalpa epochs from now, so the thirteen ancestors agreed to enter the Homeless Domain together after three kalpa epochs.
As for the other inner-circle members, they are not qualified to enter it; even the other half-step Eternal Realm experts among the inner-circle members are not qualified to enter.
This kind of opportunity is a shared opportunity exclusive to the thirteen ancestors. If Ye Tian had not become one of the thirteen ancestors, he would also not have been qualified to enter it.
Of course, if Ye Tian later discovered similar opportunities, he could also tell True River Sword Ancestor and the others, sharing some of the opportunities. This was also one of the purposes for founding the Source God Pavilion.
In the blink of an eye, three kalpa epochs passed.
On this day, the thirteen ancestors gathered at the Source God Pavilion.
“Let’s go!”
The Source God Pavilion teleported the thirteen ancestors, crossing a vast distance and directly arriving at a relatively remote region.
Very soon, the thirteen ancestors arrived at a place, and here several half-step Eternal Realm experts were hidden.
“True River Sword Ancestor, your Source God Pavilion actually brought a Ninth Supreme Being. What kind of background does this Ninth Supreme Being have?” a half-step Eternal Realm expert appeared and asked curiously.
“Rift Wind Source Ancestor, this is the thirteenth ancestor of our Source God Pavilion, Endless Primordial Ancestor.” True River Sword Ancestor casually said a sentence, and then did not say much more; moreover, his tone toward Rift Wind Source Ancestor was not very good.
It could be seen that the relationship between True River Sword Ancestor and Rift Wind Source Ancestor was not good.
At this moment, Wind Ancient Source Ancestor sent a message to Ye Tian, saying: “Rift Wind Source Ancestor is also one of the Extreme-level experts of the source sea, but his relationship with True River Sword Ancestor is not very good. The reason is that he once took away an opportunity that belonged to True River Sword Ancestor. You should be a bit careful of Rift Wind Source Ancestor in the future, but don’t worry too much. He is also only at the first Extreme level, just a little stronger than you.”
Ye Tian nodded and said nothing.
Very soon, one half-step Eternal Realm expert after another arrived, and here gathered as many as several hundred half-step Eternal Realm experts.
“It’s starting!”
The rules of the Homeless Domain and the rules of the source sea collided, and a gap began to tear open.
Whoosh whoosh whoosh!!!
One half-step Eternal Realm expert after another charged into the fissure and entered the Homeless Domain.
Ye Tian, together with True River Sword Ancestor and the others, also charged into the Homeless Domain.
Upon entering the Homeless Domain, bursts of roaring sounds came from all directions.
These sounds were unmistakably those of the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Python!
Boom!!!!
One Temporal-Spatial Dragon Python after another that stretched across the sky came threading through the void, each one unimaginably huge and exuding a terrifying aura.
“Kill!”
One half-step Eternal Realm expert after another took action and began battling the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Pythons, but their purpose was not to kill them; it was to escape from here.
Some half-step Eternal Realm experts charged toward Rift Wind Valley, where it was relatively safe and the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Pythons would not go.
Some others did not want to go to Rift Wind Valley and instead went to Homeless Mountain. Although the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Pythons could also force their way into Homeless Mountain, there were certain places in Homeless Mountain that the Temporal-Spatial Dragon Pythons could not enter.
As for the Boundless Sea, no one dared to go there.
Of course, there were even fewer half-step Eternal Realm experts wandering around aimlessly.
True River Sword Ancestor and Wind Ancient Source Ancestor directly chose Homeless Mountain, while Ye Tian chose Rift Wind Valley.
He planned to first experience the will enhancement brought by this opportunity in Rift Wind Valley; as for Homeless Mountain, it would not be too late to go there a bit later.

Chapter 1637: The Will Impact of Rift Wind Valley!

Chapter 1637: The Will Impact of Rift Wind Valley!

Ye Tian possessed the map of the Seamless Domain, and his own strength was not weak either. Moreover, there were also some half-step Eternal Realm experts heading to Rift Wind Valley, so the pressure on him was not very great.
Very quickly, he broke out of the encirclement of the Space-Time Dragon Pythons and arrived at Rift Wind Valley.
As soon as he entered Rift Wind Valley, a gust of wind blew over.

Boom!!!!!!
Waves of gentle breeze swept over and blew onto Ye Tian's will, as if his will were enduring endless pounding. This feeling was extremely painful.
Moreover, the longer the gentle breeze blew, the stronger the impact on his will became.

Inside Rift Wind Valley, one had to withstand will impact; outside Rift Wind Valley, one had to endure the siege of the Space-Time Dragon Pythons.
Therefore, no one dared to stay here for too long. Otherwise, their will would be severely injured, their strength would greatly decline, and they might even find it difficult to resist the attacks of the Space-Time Dragon Pythons.
Ye Tian walked step by step toward the depths of Rift Wind Valley, feeling the will impact brought by the gentle breeze, and actually quietly enjoyed it.
“Compared with other Supreme Beings and half-step Eternal Realm experts, I have hardly encountered any major setbacks. Although my willpower is not weak, compared with those half-step Eternal Realm experts, it is still somewhat lacking. Although Ye Tian's strength was not very great, in terms of life-saving ability, he was even more formidable than Zhenhe Sword Ancestor and the others.

No matter what method the other side used, they could not kill Star Ancestor, and could only seal him.
Therefore, even if ten Extreme experts surrounded and killed Ye Tian together, it would still be very difficult to kill him.
Unless a seven-Extreme half-step Eternal Realm expert like Wuji Ice Ancestor made a move against him, there would be hope of killing him, and it would take quite some time.
So Ye Tian was not afraid at all of being surrounded and killed by the Space-Time Dragon Pythons.

The Twelve Ancestors had revealed one piece of information: there was a place on Seamless Mountain that was extremely suitable for nine-realm Supreme Beings, where one could rapidly increase one's cultivation.
This was East Return Mountain on Seamless Mountain. On East Return Mountain, there was a special array that could combine the power of this space-time territory and convert various energies into a special kind of energy.
This energy was called Seamless Liquid. Seamless Liquid could not be preserved in the outside world for very long, so it could not be taken away and had to be refined promptly.
Seamless Liquid was likely a special energy once developed by the Seamless Domain, extremely easy to absorb and refine, surpassing any kind of energy in the Source Sea, and even worth far more than many priceless treasures that could raise one's cultivation.
If one refined Seamless Liquid, cultivation could be raised in a short time, though it would not help half-step Eternal Realm experts much.
But for nine-realm Supreme Beings, the help was immense.
That was why Ye Tian came to East Return Mountain.
After entering East Return Mountain, Ye Tian discovered that he was the only one here; the other half-step Eternal Realm experts had not come.
Very quickly, Ye Tian arrived at a rather ruined great hall. This was East Return Hall.
Although the great hall was in utter disrepair, the array could still be used.
Ye Tian activated the array here, then took out countless resources and materials.
This array could not produce Seamless Liquid out of thin air; Ye Tian had to provide the resources himself.
When countless resources surged into the core of the great array, the array began to convert energy.
As time slowly passed, a droplet of green water began to appear in the void; this green droplet was Seamless Liquid.
Ye Tian swallowed Seamless Liquid in one gulp and began refining it.
Boom!!!!
The energy of Seamless Liquid erupted, rapidly merging into Ye Tian's body, helping him temper his body and raise his cultivation.

Ye Tian muttered.
He knew full well that raising the copied body's cultivation would not help much, but he still came here. Mainly because his current strength was too weak, and he had to raise his cultivation a bit before he could obtain good things on Seamless Mountain.
Of course, his true body could also come here, but Ye Tian was unwilling to take the risk.
After all, the opportunities in the Seamless Domain had not yet reached the point where he needed to gamble his life. Besides, if he wanted to reach the Extreme of nine-realm Supreme Beings, it would just take a bit more time.
So he did not care too much.
After a long while, Ye Tian's cultivation increased greatly, and his body also became much stronger. Although he was still some distance away from the Extreme of nine-realm Supreme Beings, his ordinary combat strength was probably enough to match Gold Chen Source Ancestor among the Twelve Ancestors.

Ye Tian muttered.
Whoosh!
His body disappeared from East Return Mountain, and very soon he arrived at Seamless Tower on Seamless Mountain.
Seamless Tower was a test tower once built by the Seamless Domain Lord for disciples or servants. The tower had nine levels, and for every level passed, one could obtain the corresponding reward.
Now, although the Seamless Domain Lord had fallen, Seamless Tower still remained, and there were still some rewards inside.
At this moment.

.... ....... .......

Willpower transformed into a world, forming countless billions upon countless billions of worlds of will throughout the body. When willpower becomes strong enough, it can even allow the body to erupt with explosive power and combat strength that surpasses the limit.

This secret art was very suitable for him!

Chapter 1639 The Forbidden Stele That Disappointed Ye Tian!

Chapter 1639 The Forbidden Stele That Disappointed Ye Tian!

For Ye Tian, obtaining the secret art of the world of will this time was the greatest gain, even more precious than all kinds of rare resources.

At this moment.

At this moment.
Many half-step Eternal Realm cultivators took out various resources to assist their comprehension, helping themselves comprehend quickly.

Boom!!!!

Therefore, these examples of fusion could not be fully combined; they could only provide some limited gain.
Of course.
The Forbidden Stele still allowed half-step Eternal Realm cultivators to gain a deeper understanding and insight into their own Eternal Law or Innate Eternal Law, and that was also one of its benefits.
“Too bad it isn’t of much help to me!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
He would be better off using cloned bodies in the future to repeatedly attempt fusion, finding experience through countless failures; that would definitely be more useful than comprehending the Forbidden Stele.
But other half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses did not have methods like his, so naturally they could not do that. They could only rely on treasures like the Forbidden Stele, seeking hope again and again.
After comprehending it for some time, Ye Tian gave up on the Forbidden Stele and chose to leave.
Afterward, at various blessed places on Mistless Mountain, he also gained some things.
For example, in one place on Mistless Mountain there were traces of an Eternal Realm battle; those traces still remained, and one could still feel the profound mysteries of Eternal Realm techniques.
Another example was the rows of stone statues on Mistless Mountain. These stone statues contained some inheritances, and if one carefully comprehended them, one could still gain some Eternal techniques.
However, this was only helpful to ordinary half-step Eternal Realm cultivators. Those ordinary half-step Eternal Realm cultivators had not comprehended any Eternal techniques before, which was why they wanted to obtain some Eternal technique inheritances and use other Eternal techniques to create their own.
But Ye Tian already possessed a large number of Eternal techniques, so he looked down on such inheritances.
One blessed place after another was rather disappointing to Ye Tian.
It had to be said that his vision was now higher, and he no longer looked favorably upon the benefits here.
“Mistless Territory was discovered long ago. I don’t know how many half-step Eternal Realm cultivators have entered here; the benefits that can be left behind are too few........”
Ye Tian thought.
But this time, his greatest gains still came from the Rift Wind Valley and the world of will; next were treasures like the Void God Leaf.
After some more time passed, True River Sword Ancestor and the others invited Ye Tian to go to certain territories of the Mistless Territory to collect resources. As long as they could withstand the attacks of the Space-Time Dragon Pythons, they could seize some of the resources that were born here.
As long as they did not go to Endless Sea, there was actually still a great chance of surviving.
But there would definitely be powerhouses who went to Endless Sea, such as those half-step Eternal Realm cultivators of the fifth and sixth tiers. They probably would join forces to force their way into Endless Sea and seize those extremely precious resources.
Ye Tian rejected True River Sword Ancestor’s suggestion; he had no interest in this now.
At this moment.
Ye Tian was trying to cultivate the world of will in Rift Wind Valley, and his clone had also returned here.
In fact, clones and copy bodies both possessed the Copying Talent. Even if one of them fell, the Copying Talent could copy another one again.
Therefore, he could continuously try to cultivate the world of will without fear of falling.
And the environment of Rift Wind Valley was perfectly suited to the world of will; it was the best place.
The wind of Rift Wind Valley tempered the will, while the world of will strengthened the will. The two combined perfectly, but without many lives to spare, even the Mistless Territory Lord would not dare to cultivate so crazily—yet Ye Tian did.
On this day.
When Ye Tian was cultivating the world of will, a problem arose with his will, causing a problem with his body.
Coupled with the wind of Rift Wind Valley blowing over, his will collapsed and his flesh began to disintegrate.
Instantly, this clone dissipated.
“The clone has fallen; copy another one!”
Ye Tian accelerated time, and very soon he could condense another body and begin cultivating again.
No one knew how long had passed when True River Sword Ancestor sent a transmission.
“Endless Ancestor, the entrance is about to close. We have to leave!”
Ye Tian immediately replied to him: “True River Sword Ancestor, what I entered with was a clone, and I didn’t bring any treasures. I’m not planning to leave. I intend to cultivate here for a few more days!”
True River Sword Ancestor did not try to persuade Ye Tian anymore; he guessed that Ye Tian was cultivating in Rift Wind Valley.
But if one cultivated for too long, the clone would not be able to hold on and would still have to come out. Once it came out, it would have to withstand the attacks of the Space-Time Dragon Pythons, and still would not survive.
Therefore, doing this would only let him stay a few more days; it was of little use.
However, he also knew that Ye Tian was only a clone, so the loss was not great, and thus he did not try to persuade him.
Very soon, one after another half-step Eternal Realm cultivators left the Mistless Territory, leaving only Ye Tian behind.

Chapter 1640: Will World, Second Stage!

Chapter 1640: Will World, Second Stage!

Only one person remained in Wuhen Territory.
However, before the entrance of Wuhen Territory disappeared, Ye Tian still sent his clone out for a trip, letting his main body take away some of the treasures carried by the clone.
For example, the Void God Leaf; this item was relatively valuable and could not be lost.
Afterward, the clone self-Annihilated, and the copied body recondensed again in Wuhen Territory.
In this way, Ye Tian could boldly and confidently use Split Wind Valley to cultivate the Will World.
His copied body was at the very edge of Split Wind Valley, where the will impact was the weakest, so the copied body could endure for a very long time without needing to leave Split Wind Valley.
Meanwhile, his clone was within the inner region of Split Wind Valley, enduring the intense will impact, crazily tempering its own will, and cultivating in coordination with the Will World.
Just like that, with the clone collapsing again and again and cultivating again and again, Ye Tian came to understand the Will World more and more.
Will was unlike cultivation; as the will of the copied body and the clone increased, Ye Tian's main body's will would also increase. This was much like accumulating experience and comprehension.
As the clone collapsed time and time again, his will still kept improving, and he also gradually gained a deeper comprehension of this secret art, the Will World, combining it with Ye Tian's own situation to turn it into a secret art belonging to Ye Tian, while steadily perfecting it step by step.
He would not safely and directly cultivate according to Wuhen Territory Lord's secret art method; that would easily lead to collapse. He had to improve it himself and adapt it to his own body before it could become a truly powerful will secret art.
On this day.
The Will World had made new progress, and he was preparing to open up a Will World.
Once a Will World was opened up, it meant that the Will World secret art had reached the first Stage.
Ye Tian continuously condensed will through the Will World secret art, opening up a Will World inside a certain cell of his body. The Will World was not a real world, so even a single cell could bear it.
“Will World, open!”
In the unknown layer of the cell, a Will World was forcibly opened up, and endless will manifested there in tangible form.
At the same time, Ye Tian had complete control over this cell and could erupt with terrifying power.
Moreover, he could use this cell as the core and radiate it throughout his entire body, thereby allowing his body to erupt with far more power than usual.
More importantly, once the Will World was opened up, it could slowly strengthen his will, which was also one channel for will improvement.
One could imagine how fast the will improvement speed would be, and how powerful the will would become, once large numbers of Will Worlds were opened up.
It had to be said that the Will World secret art created by Wuhen Territory Lord was indeed terrifying; it was just a pity that even he himself did not dare cultivate it.
The clone successfully opened up a Will World, but the main body naturally could not automatically open up a Will World.
Thus.
Ye Tian's main body also needed to open up a Will World, and since this process had already been improved, there would be no danger.
Ye Tian then began opening up a Will World inside the Void Source Hall.
Very soon, the main body successfully opened up a Will World.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian's clone stayed in Split Wind Valley. Because a Will World had been opened and his will strengthened, he could remain in Split Wind Valley for a longer time.
Moreover, Ye Tian could go deeper into Split Wind Valley.
Just like that, another period of time passed.
On this day, Ye Tian began to open up the second Will World.
Unfortunately, the opening of the second Will World failed.
Ye Tian quickly found the reason: it was influenced by the first Will World. The first Will World radiated throughout the entire body, and under its influence, if the second Will World were opened in the same way as the first, it would inevitably fail.
The failure to open up the Will World directly dealt a severe blow to Ye Tian's will.
Helplessly, Ye Tian self-Annihilated this clone and then recondensed another one, which was more convenient than slowly recovering his will.
In the years that followed, Ye Tian continuously studied how to create a second Will World and discovered that this had a great deal to do with the chosen cell position.
It could be said that the cell position chosen for each subsequent Will World had to follow a certain pattern in order to avoid interference.
After many attempts, Ye Tian finally found the proper position and opened up the second Will World.
After the second Will World was successfully opened, Ye Tian's main body began to open up the second Will World as well, succeeding in one go without any problems.
Unknowingly, Ye Tian's copied body and clone had stayed in Split Wind Valley for several tribulation eras.
Such a long span of years, with Ye Tian's clone still existing there, would probably be unimaginable in the eyes of people like True River Sword Ancestor and the others, yet no one knew about it.
By now, Ye Tian had already opened more than three hundred Will Worlds.
If he opened one thousand Will Worlds, that would be equivalent to stepping into the second Stage of the Will World secret art.
“According to the introduction of the Will World secret art, once the Will World reaches the second Stage, the will will undergo a transformation!” Ye Tian was not sure whether this was true, but he very much wanted to raise the Will World to the second Stage.
Now, his understanding of the Will World secret art was deepening more and more, and the speed at which he opened up Will Worlds was also getting faster and faster.
Moreover, his clone had already reached the core area of Split Wind Valley.
Few half-step Eternal Realm experts dared to come here; otherwise, their will would be blasted into collapse by the impact.
Ye Tian knew very well that, with his current level of will, he originally would not have been able to reach this place. But more than three hundred Will Worlds radiating through his body had made his resistance to will impact terrifyingly strong, allowing him to come here.
On this day.
Ye Tian truly walked to the most core area of Split Wind Valley, where he saw a huge rock.
This huge rock was gray in color, covered with densely packed patterns that were not engraved onto it, but naturally formed.
“The will impact in Split Wind Valley should be emanating from this rock. In other words, this rock created the anomaly of Split Wind Valley!”
Ye Tian said in surprise.
He wanted to take this rock away, but found that he could not move it.
Clearly, Wuhen Territory Lord had also placed a restriction on this rock, perfectly fusing it with Wuhen Territory so that it could not be taken away.
Afterwards.
Ye Tian sat cross-legged on this will rock, enduring the impact of will while cultivating the Will World.
Unknowingly, another five tribulation eras passed.
At this time, the number of Ye Tian's Will Worlds had reached 999; just one last one remained before he could reach the second Stage of the Will World and trigger a transformation of will.
Boom!!!!
The 1000th Will World was born!
Ye Tian's will began to undergo a qualitative change, as though it had stepped into an entirely new tier.
At this moment.
The countless cells in Ye Tian's body all resonated with the transformation of his will, and his body radiated endless will light, illuminating the surrounding void.
After a long while, the transformation of will came to an end.
“My will has increased tenfold!”
Ye Tian said in shock.
Before, the improvement of his will had been very, very slow, but this time the increase was too terrifying!
Moreover, his will had become even more tenacious.
In addition, Ye Tian discovered that when he infused his will into his fist or weapon, it became incomparably sharp and could easily tear apart the body of a half-step Eternal Realm expert.
Of course, this was tested with Ye Tian's copied body.
Moreover, will could also enhance his defense.
“After will reaches the second Stage, it is actually this terrifying. Perhaps the will of Eternal Realm existences is also like this! Second Stage will should be equivalent to the will of an Eternal Realm existence!”
Ye Tian speculated.
In short, after the transformation of his will reached the second Stage, his strength also transformed; at the very least, he could already match a true First Realm, and was not weaker than True River Sword Ancestor and the others.

Chapter 1641 Breakthrough, Half-Step Eternal Realm!

Chapter 1641 Breakthrough, Half-Step Eternal Realm!

Very quickly.
Ye Tian’s true body and clone body both stepped into the second stage of the will world, each condensing 1000 will worlds, and both completed their transformation.
After the transformation of his will, Ye Tian discovered that the Rift Wind Valley could no longer create any impact on his will at all.
In other words, Rift Wind Valley could no longer help him.
He could continue cultivating his will world, but he could no longer rely on Rift Wind Valley.
“Forget it. I’ve already gained such great benefits this time; I should be satisfied!”
Ye Tian muttered.

But from time to time, some important notices were still sent to him by message.
The Twelve Ancestors also made one move, but Ye Tian did not go to participate.
For experts like True River Sword Ancestor at the Extreme Stage level, they had already been stuck at the Half-Step Eternal Realm for countless years, and in their dreams they all wanted to break through and become Eternal Realm beings.
Therefore, they would participate in any opportunity and never give up. What if they really happened to break through by chance?
On this day.
Ye Tian dissolved his clone body and avatar by himself, leaving the Traceless Territory in this way.
And the several treasures he had obtained from the Traceless Tower back then, after True River Sword Ancestor and the others left, also had their avatars walk out of the entrance, allowing the true body to take away treasures such as the Void God Leaf.
Thus, these treasures were not lost either.
Void Source Hall.
The clone body and avatar were once again condensed. The avatar cultivated the will world, while the clone body comprehended the Innate Eternal Rule, and as for the true body, it mainly focused on improving its cultivation.
What Ye Tian most wanted to do right now was raise his cultivation to the Extreme of the Ninth-Stage Supreme Being. Only in that way would his strength advance by leaps and bounds, even becoming much stronger than True River Sword Ancestor, perhaps giving him hope of matching a Second Extreme Stage Half-Step Eternal Realm being.
However, cultivating from Ninth-Stage Supreme Being to the Extreme of Ninth-Stage Supreme Being also required enormous resources and time; the deeper the foundation, the longer it naturally took.
Ten calamity eras!
One hundred calamity eras!
One thousand calamity eras!
Unknowingly, tens of thousands of calamity eras had passed.
After such a long period, and after expending many resources, Ye Tian finally raised his cultivation to the Extreme of Ninth-Stage Supreme Being.
At this moment, he was only one step away from the Half-Step Eternal Realm.
To break through from Ninth-Stage Supreme Being to the Half-Step Eternal Realm, the Eternal Rule needed to fit with the body, and there was no need for perfect fusion; if one could truly fuse, that would be the Eternal Realm.
But even merely fitting with the body was extremely difficult, and if one’s bodily potential was insufficient or one’s foundation inadequate, there would be no way to break through the shackle.
Only with sufficient potential and foundation could one borrow the moment of fitting with the Eternal Rule to break the shackle and advance into the Half-Step Eternal Realm.
It was not too difficult for Ye Tian to advance into the Half-Step Eternal Realm, but he currently had one trouble: he had comprehended the Innate Eternal Rule.
In other words, while others only needed to fit with the Eternal Rule, he needed to fit with the Innate Eternal Rule in order to borrow that power of compatibility to break the shackle and advance into the Half-Step Eternal Realm.
Thus, the difficulty had increased by more than tenfold.
But once he broke through, the increase in strength would surely be the greatest as well.
“If the true body directly attempts the breakthrough, the success rate won’t be very high. Let the clone body try breaking through repeatedly first! Even if it fails, it can still accumulate some experience. There’s no need to rush the matter of breaking through to the Half-Step Eternal Realm!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
In the days that followed, Ye Tian occasionally let the clone body attempt a breakthrough, but at the beginning, it failed every time.
After all, the shackle from Ninth-Stage Supreme Being to the Half-Step Eternal Realm was very difficult to overcome, and many Half-Step Eternal Realm cultivators had relied on external objects when they first broke through, more or less damaging their foundations.
Ye Tian did not want to rely on external objects. Otherwise, he still had the Void True Liquid in his possession; if he took the Void True Liquid, he would be able to break through to the Half-Step Eternal Realm with one hundred percent certainty.
But if that were the case, it would have a huge impact on his future attempt to impact the Eternal Realm.
Therefore, he did not want to use Void True Liquid to break through.
After many attempts, Ye Tian gradually mastered quite a bit of breakthrough experience, and finally on this day successfully broke through to the Half-Step Eternal Realm.
Of course, this was only the clone body breaking through, not the true body.
Afterwards.
Ye Tian dissolved the clone body and began breaking through again.
Gradually, Ye Tian could almost guarantee that he would break through with one hundred percent certainty.
-------------------
“Break through!”
Ye Tian’s true body began to choose to assault the Half-Step Eternal Realm.
Only to see that his incomparably powerful body and the Innate Eternal Rule reached a certain degree of compatibility in a short time, as though the Innate Eternal Rule was fusing with the body on another level, but it was not a true fusion.
And the shackles in the dark, under this state of compatibility, began to become very easy to assault.
Thus, Ye Tian went all out to assault the shackles.
Crack!!!!
The shackles were shattered, the bottleneck was broken, and Ye Tian officially stepped into the Half-Step Eternal Realm level.
At this moment, his body began to transform, and even the power within him began to convert into Half-Step Eternal power.
Not only that, Ye Tian’s will also rose by a great margin.
After a long time, Ye Tian’s breakthrough was finally completely finished.
“Far, far stronger power than before!”
Ye Tian said excitedly.
At this moment, he could already be considered Extreme Stage.
Because he had reached the Half-Step Eternal Realm, created many Eternal Techniques, and also comprehended the Innate Eternal Rule, there was no real difference from Extreme Stage.
The only somewhat weak point was that his Half-Step Eternal power was still relatively weak.
However, the Half-Step Eternal Realm did not emphasize cultivation level, so he could be considered an Extreme Stage-level Half-Step Eternal Realm.
Ye Tian closed his eyes and sensed the state of his body, immediately realizing what level his current strength was probably at.
Three Extreme Stage!
Before the breakthrough, he had been between One Extreme Stage and Two Extreme Stage, or rather, the weakest Two Extreme Stage. But now, he could already be considered a top-tier Three Extreme Stage, only one step away from Four Extreme Stage.
As long as he stabilized his realm and increased his Half-Step Eternal power, his strength would formally step into the level of a Four Extreme Stage Half-Step Eternal Realm.
And the cultivation of Extreme Stage was to strengthen the Innate Eternal Rule, using the compatibility between the Innate Eternal Rule and the body to stimulate the body to strengthen step by step, thereby reaching a higher Extreme Stage.
With Ye Tian’s current potential and standard, before becoming Seven Extreme Stage, he would practically not encounter any bottleneck at all.
As for other Half-Step Eternal Realm cultivators, such as True River Sword Ancestor, they found it very difficult to continue improving already at the One Extreme Stage level, because what he could improve had basically already been improved, and the remaining parts were very hard to improve.
After breaking through to the Half-Step Eternal Realm, Ye Tian quickly discovered a problem: his cultivation consumed too much. Although he had once obtained massive resources in the Primordial Sea, even that could not withstand such consumption.
In addition, condensing clone bodies also required resources, and the resources consumed by countless condensations and dissolutions were an astronomical number.
According to his estimate, by the time he became a Five Extreme Stage Half-Step Eternal Realm, he would probably have no resources left.

Chapter 1642 The Opportunity of One Hundred Thousand Eternal Years!

Chapter 1642 The Opportunity of One Hundred Thousand Eternal Years!

“In the future, I still need to collect more resources!”
Ye Tian thought to himself.
With his current strength, collecting resources would not be too slow either. After all, he would soon be able to reach the Half-Step Eternal Realm Stage of the Four Extremes Realm, and in the Source Sea, Half-Step Eternal Realm powerhouses above the Four Extremes Realm were exceedingly rare, numbering no more than fifteen.
Coupled with his life-preserving ability, it could be said that in the Source Sea, he was almost not afraid of anyone; no one could kill him unless an Eternal Realm expert came over from the Time-Space Territory.
